meta.title: DEF CON 29 Blockchain Village  - Josh McIntyre - Subtle Ways to Lose Your Cryptocurrency
meta.description: As the cryptocurrency ecosystem grows, thieves and scammers are evolving their tactics to get their piece of someone else's crypto pie. This talk will examine common ways that users lose cryptocurrency, and how to prevent these types of attacks. We will cover attack vectors such as malware, social engineering, user error, and more.
